title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Curriculum Developer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
